# AeroSurf Optics

AeroSurf Optics is an action-driven online eyewear boutique exclusively dedicated to high-performance sunglasses for surfers and cyclists. The brand's flagship product, the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Polarized Series, is built around a single game-changing USP: a detachable, adjustable floating safety strap that ensures the glasses never sink during ocean wipeouts or intense trail rides. With a bold, energized, globally accessible voice and a flat worldwide price of $49 USD, AeroSurf Optics positions itself as the go-to performance eyewear brand for water and road athletes who demand both protection and reliability. The brand identity blends technical precision with adventure-sport culture, offering four distinctly styled editions to match different athlete personalities.

Source: https://aerosurf-optics-3fe67efe.zappy5.app

---

# Polarized Eyewear That Stays With You, Surf or Trail


### The B BLIZ Breeze 2026 features a detachable, adjustable floating safety strap — never lose your shades to the ocean or the dirt. Flat $49 USD, tracked shipping worldwide.

## Engineered for the Elements, Priced for Everyone


Every pair of B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Polarized Performance Eyewear includes four core advantages that keep you focused on the ride, not on your gear.








### Anti-Loss Floating Strap


The adjustable premium sports band locks your eyewear in place during heavy action and actually floats on water if dropped. No more lost sunglasses after a wipeout or a rough trail section.







### Dual-Sport Wind & Glare Control


Optimized for both surf spray and high-speed cycling descents. The wrap-around lens profile cuts through wind and eliminates distracting glare, giving you crystal-clear vision in any environment.







### UV400 & Polarized Elite Protection


Full UV400 shielding combined with polarized elite lenses filters out 99% of harmful rays and reflective bounce. Your eyes stay protected and fatigue-free during all-day ocean or road sessions.







### Flat Worldwide Price: $49 USD


No hidden fees, no regional markups. Every pair ships with worldwide tracking at a clean, flat rate. Premium polarized performance sunglasses for surfers and cyclists, globally accessible.














## The B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Series


Four performance editions. One game-changing floating strap. Your polarized sunglasses for surfers and cyclists, ready for anything.

### Stealth Operator

For the rider who moves in silence.

### High-Vis Speed

Lead the pack with fearless clarity.

Crystal Frame • Photochromic Lens


Chase the endless horizon.

Cycling

Description: Explore the tech behind our floating strap sports sunglasses. UV400 polarized lenses, impact-proof frames, and a detachable tether keep your vision locked in any condition.

# Dual-Sport Eyewear Built for Surf & Cycle


AeroSurf Optics delivers one focused performance system engineered for water and road athletes. Every pair is built around anti-loss reliability, advanced glare control, and all-day clarity — so you can charge harder without worrying about your gear.


- Anti-Loss Floating Strap Detachable, adjustable, and buoyant. Never sinks during wipeouts or rough trails.

- Polarized UV400 Lenses Blocks 99.9% of glare and harmful rays for razor-sharp vision on water and asphalt.

- Flat $49 USD Worldwide One clean price. Tracked shipping available to over 180 countries.

- 4 Performance Editions Distinct colorways tuned for surf, road, trail, and mixed conditions.



Explore the B BLIZ Breeze 2026
Ask a Question















## Engineered for the Elements


Every component of the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Polarized Series is purpose-built to solve the real-world challenges of water and road athletes. No gimmicks, just relentless performance.













### Anti-Loss Floating Strap System


The game-changing USP that defines the B BLIZ Breeze 2026. Our detachable, adjustable safety strap is crafted from high-buoyancy closed-cell foam and marine-grade elastic. During an unexpected ocean wipeout or a rocky trail dismount, the strap activates instantly — keeping your eyewear locked to you and floating securely on the surface. You focus on the ride; we take care of the gear.


- Adjustable quick-release buckle for one-handed operation

- Non-absorbent foam core stays lightweight even when wet

- High-visibility orange accent for rapid water retrieval












### Aerodynamic Wind-Blocking Frame


Speed demands minimal resistance. The B BLIZ Breeze frame features a sculpted, wraparound profile tested in wind tunnels to reduce drag and shield your eyes from crosswinds, dust, and road spray. The extended temple arms integrate seamlessly with helmet straps, ensuring zero pressure points during century rides or all-day surf checks. It is the definitive dual sport sunglasses surf and cycling frame geometry.


- Full-wrap 8-base curvature for maximum peripheral protection

- Vented temple tips to prevent fogging during high exertion

- Hydrophobic coating sheds water instantly on contact












### Polarized UV400 Multi-Layer Lens


Water reflections and highway glare are the enemies of clarity. Our advanced polarized sunglasses for surfers feature a tri-layer UV400 lens construction that blocks 100% of UVA/UVB rays while selectively filtering horizontal glare. The result is razor-sharp contrast on open water and early detection of road hazards, potholes, and gravel patches. Color perception remains natural, reducing eye fatigue across long sessions.


- Scratch-resistant hard coat with oleophobic top layer

- Lightweight polycarbonate substrate for impact safety

- Available in four edition-specific tint profiles















## Engineered for the elements


One eyewear system. Four punishing conditions. Zero compromises.




Condition
Ocean Glare
Fast Descents
Trail Vibration

Visibility Benefits


Enhanced depth perception on waves



Sharpens road detail at speed



Improves contrast on uneven terrain



Reduces eye strain in shifting conditions






Flat worldwide price:  $49 USD  — tracked shipping available to all countries.












## Frequently Asked Questions


Quick answers about your B BLIZ Breeze 2026 polarized sunglasses for surfers and cyclists. Everything you need to know before you ride or paddle out.





### Is the safety strap really detachable?


Absolutely. The adjustable floating safety strap clips on and off in seconds using our secure quick-release anchors. Wear it strapped for heavy surf or technical trails, and remove it when you want a classic look.




### Does it actually float if I wipe out?


Yes — that's the core innovation. The strap is engineered with buoyant materials that keep the entire B BLIZ Breeze 2026 floating on the surface. You'll never lose your eyewear to the ocean or a rocky descent again.




### Are the lenses polarized and UV400 rated?


Every pair ships with premium polarized lenses that eliminate glare off water and asphalt, combined with full UV400 protection. Your eyes stay sharp and shielded in the brightest conditions.




### Can I use the same pair for surfing and cycling?


Definitely. The B BLIZ Breeze 2026 is built as a dual-sport performance tool. Hydrophobic lens coating sheds water during surf sessions, while the lightweight frame and secure strap lock in for high-speed cycling stability.




### How does worldwide shipping work?


We offer tracked worldwide delivery at a flat rate. Your $49 USD order arrives with full visibility from dispatch to doorstep. Duties and taxes are calculated transparently at checkout — no surprises.




### How do I choose among the four editions?


Each edition shares the same floating strap and polarized lens technology. The difference is purely aesthetic — choose the colorway and frame finish that matches your personal style. Performance remains identical across the lineup.














Precision eyewear engineered for the surf and the summit. Trusted by athletes worldwide.

URL: https://aerosurf-optics-3fe67efe.zappy5.app/editions
Description: Meet the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Series—four distinct editions of dual sport sunglasses for surf and cycling. Pick the style that matches your adventure personality at $49.

# Four Editions. One Performance Core.


Every B BLIZ Breeze 2026 frame is built on the same game-changing foundation: polarized UV400 lenses, an anti-loss floating safety strap, and a flat worldwide price of $49 USD. The four editions below are pure style expression for different athlete personalities—same elite protection, zero compromises.












### OCEAN CREST


Frame & Lens: Deep teal translucent frame with mirrored blue lenses. Built for the surfer who moves with the tide.


Personality Fit: The water purist who feels most alive in the lineup.











### TRAIL BLAZE


Frame & Lens: Matte burnt orange frame with dark smoke lenses. Engineered for the cyclist who charges the steepest lines.


Personality Fit: The trail hunter who thrives on dust and elevation.











### MIDNIGHT DRIVE


Frame & Lens: Stealth matte black frame with high-contrast grey lenses. Precision optics for the urban road warrior.


Personality Fit: The after-hours rider who owns the city streets.











### WHITE CAP


Frame & Lens: Glossy arctic white frame with amber-gold lenses. High-visibility style for the boldest ocean moves.


Personality Fit: The standout charger who commands the break.












## Four Editions. One Strap. Zero Sink.


Explore the complete B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Polarized Series. Every edition includes the patent-pending floating safety strap, UV400 polarized lenses, and impact-resistant frames — engineered for saltwater wipeouts and dusty trail descents alike.

Not sure which edition fits your ride or wave? Our team knows the difference between a road cycling lens and a deep-water polarized tint. Reach out and we'll help you choose the right B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Series for your sport, style, and light conditions.

# Let's Talk Performance


Got a question about fit, lens performance, or which edition matches your style? Our team is ready to help surfers, cyclists, and outdoor athletes find the perfect polarized sunglasses for surfing and riding. We provide personal guidance on the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Series and worldwide tracked shipping details.




Worldwide inquiries answered in under 24 hours



Personalized advice on the 4 Breeze editions



Tracked shipping to 200+ countries — flat $49 USD

### What to Expect


Our support team specializes in helping athletes choose the right edition for their sport, answering performance-related questions about the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Polarized Series, and providing shipping clarification for worldwide delivery.


- Edition guidance for Surf & Cycle variants

- Performance & floating safety strap questions

- Worldwide tracked shipping clarification






We typically respond within 24 hours.





















### Worldwide Shipping, No Surprises


We ship the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Series to over 180 countries with full tracking and transparent customs handling. Your sunglasses arrive ready for action – no hidden fees, no guesswork.








### One Flagship. Four Editions.


AeroSurf Optics sells only the B BLIZ Breeze 2026 Polarized Series – available in four distinct styles to match your ride or wave. No clutter, no confusion, just the ultimate dual-sport eyewear.








### Plain-English Support, Any Time Zone


Our team answers in clear, simple English within 24 hours – whether you're in Bali, Biarritz, or Boulder. We help you choose the right edition, track your order, or handle returns fast.

## Return Policy

URL: https://aerosurf-optics-3fe67efe.zappy5.app/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - AeroSurf Optics

































































- Products Products




- Home
- Performance
- Editions
- Contact
0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/20/2026



At AeroSurf Optics, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/20/2026



AeroSurf Optics ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: AeroSurf Optics

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice















Precision eyewear engineered for the surf and the summit. Trusted by athletes worldwide.

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 20, 2026



AeroSurf Optics is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: AeroSurf Optics

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Precision eyewear engineered for the surf and the summit. Trusted by athletes worldwide.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 20, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - AeroSurf Optics

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - E-Commerce / Sports Eyewear provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


AeroSurf Optics provides E-Commerce / Sports Eyewear through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by AeroSurf Optics. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: AeroSurf Optics

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
